content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Thorough review of the BackendExhausted graceful degradation feature. The implementation is well-structured: FailureClass::BackendExhausted is correctly added as a terminal/non-retryable variant, pattern detection in is_backend_exhausted covers known providers with careful separation of transient vs persistent rate limits, and panel degradation logic in final_review, completion, and prompt_review correctly handles quorum reduction, early-exit checks, and propagation of BackendExhausted when all members are exhausted. The engine-level preflight, pre-snapshot filtering, and resume paths all consistently apply the same degradation pattern. All 581 tests pass. No clippy warnings from changed files. No correctness bugs, safety issues, or significant maintainability risks found.

## Amendments

None.
